title: Gun Industry and NRA Political Spending

nssf_trade_association.comparison: NSSF outspends NRA on lobbying; NRA outspends on elections

spending_asymmetry_reversal.2018: Gun control outspent NRA for first time by $2.6M margin
spending_asymmetry_reversal.2019: Bloomberg outspent NRA in Virginia state elections
spending_asymmetry_reversal.2024: Gun control $18.3M outside spending (up from $14K in 2016)
drivers: Competing gun rights groups fragmenting pro-gun side

legal_consequences.bankruptcy_dismissed: January 2021 — not filed in good faith
legal_consequences.lapierre_verdict: February 2024 — liable for $5.4M, must pay $4.35M back

russian_money_investigation.maria_butina: Pleaded guilty Dec 2018 to conspiracy as unregistered foreign agent
russian_money_investigation.senate_report: 'The NRA and Russia: How a Tax-Exempt Organization Became a Foreign Asset' (Sept 2019)
russian_money_investigation.key_finding: NRA acted as 'foreign asset' for Russia leading up to 2016
russian_money_investigation.torshin: Russian central bank official, NRA lifetime member
russian_money_investigation.scale: Documented facilitation of access/influence; no large-scale laundering proven

stanford_2026_study.pro_gun_pac_increase: 31% after fatal school shooting in competitive districts
stanford_2026_study.finding: Both sides now intervene at same scale, making outrage harder to translate to change

post_shooting_patterns.parkland_2018: Gun control outspent NRA first time; FL raised purchase age to 21
post_shooting_patterns.uvalde_2022: Bipartisan Safer Communities Act — first federal gun law in 30 years; 15 GOP senators defied NRA
post_shooting_patterns.paradox: Year after Uvalde: 56% of 93 new state gun laws EXPANDED firearm access

state_ballot_measures.success_rate: Background check measures: 86% success rate in statewide referenda

2024_election.nra_tester_ad_buy: $2M TV ads against Sen. Jon Tester (MT)
2024_election.ballot_measure_wins: Gun safety prevailed in NV, WA, CA
